title: At the Vegetable Market 菜市场
scene: 妈妈带女儿去菜市场买菜。

lines.en: Sophie, come with Mom to the market. We need vegetables for dinner.
lines.zh: 苏菲，跟妈妈去菜市场。我们需要买些菜做晚饭。

lines.en: OK! What are we going to cook tonight?
lines.zh: 好的！我们今晚做什么菜？

lines.en: I'm thinking of making tomato and egg stir-fry.
Fresh tomatoes! Very cheap today! Two yuan a kilo!
lines.zh: 新鲜番茄！今天很便宜！两元一公斤！

lines.en: Good! I'll take two kilos of tomatoes.
Mom, can we also buy some green vegetables?
lines.zh: 妈妈，我们也能买些绿叶菜吗？

lines.en: Yes! This broccoli is very fresh. Just picked this morning.
lines.zh: 可以！这个西兰花很新鲜。今天早上刚摘的。

lines.en: OK, give me one kilo of broccoli. And some garlic, please.
lines.zh: 好的，给我一公斤西兰花。再来些蒜。

lines.en: The market is so lively! I like coming here with you, Mom.
lines.zh: 菜市场好热闹啊！我喜欢和你一起来，妈妈。

lines.en: Me too, dear. Let's go home and cook a delicious dinner!
lines.zh: 我也是，亲爱的。我们回家做一顿美味的晚饭吧！
